name: Glazed Carrot Nut Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup finely chopped walnuts or pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the oil and sugar with a mixer for 5 minutes.
2. Sift the remaining ingredients together and stir into the sugar mixture.
3. Blend thoroughly.
4. Add the remaining half of dry ingredients, alternately with eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Add carrots and nuts, mix well, and pour into a lightly oiled 10-inch tube pan.
6. Bake at 325 degrees F for 1 hour and 15 minutes. When done, invert the pan on a cake rack and let cool.
7. For the glaze, place sugar, orange zest, cornstarch, and orange juice in a saucepan and stir until well mixed.
8. Add lemon juice, butter, and salt. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, until thick and glossy.
9. Let cool until tepid, then spread on the unmolded cake.
10. When cooled, freeze the cake on a tray, then remove, wrap, label, and put back in the freezer for storage if desired.
